case_title: GOMEZ, CYNTHIA SUZANNE et al vs. TALAVERA, BEVERLY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, CYNTHIA SUZANNE GOMEZ, JENNILEE AS TO DEFENDANT TALAVERA, BEVERLY HAAS JR., FRANK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-14-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-24-1997

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-14-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-14-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR APR-15-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
